mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_exchange_order ( cl_order_id, shareholder_id, market, security_id, side, original_qty, qty, price, status, create_time, version ) VALUES ( #{clOrderId}, #{shareholderId}, #{market}, #{securityId}, #{side,typeHandler=com.example.trading.common.typehandler.SideEnumTypeHandler}, #{originalQty}, #{qty}, #{price}, #{status,typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumOrdinalTypeHandler}, #{createTime}, #{version} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE qty = VALUES(qty), status = VALUES(status), version = version + 1
mapper.update: UPDATE t_exchange_order SET qty = #{qty}, status = #{status,typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumOrdinalTypeHandler}, version = version + 1 WHERE cl_order_id = #{clOrderId}
mapper.select:
SELECT cl_order_id, id, version FROM t_exchange_order WHERE cl_order_id IN
#{clOrderId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_exchange_order ( cl_order_id, shareholder_id, market, security_id, side, original_qty, qty, price, status, create_time, version ) VALUES
( #{item.clOrderId}, #{item.shareholderId}, #{item.market}, #{item.securityId}, #{item.side, typeHandler=com.example.trading.common.typehandler.SideEnumTypeHandler}, #{item.originalQty}, #{item.qty}, #{item.price}, #{item.status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumOrdinalTypeHandler}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.version}+1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_exchange_order SET qty = #{qty}, status = #{status,typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumOrdinalTypeHandler}, version = version + 1 WHERE cl_order_id = #{clOrderId} AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM t_exchange_order WHERE cl_order_id = #{clOrderId}
